app.subtitle: Store and organize Matter pairing codes
categories.title: Categories
search.placeholder: Search by name, type, or code…
empty.no_codes: No Matter codes yet. Click + Code to get started.
code.name: Name
alert.save_before_sync: Save the code before syncing from Home Assistant.
alert.cloud_sync_fail: Cloud sync failed. Check add-on options.
backup.gdrive_inactive: Google Drive not configured — configure under Settings → Apps → Rematters.
lang.label: Language
scan.title: Scan Matter code
scan.hint_native: Point your camera at the Matter QR on the device or manual.
scan.hint_fallback: Allow camera access to scan. On older browsers, upload a photo below.
scan.hint_photo: Upload a photo of the QR code.
scan.unrecognized: Could not read a Matter code from that scan.
scan.duplicate: This Matter code is already saved as “{name}”.
scan.camera_denied: Camera unavailable. Upload a photo of the QR code instead.
scan.photo_fail: Could not read a QR code from that image.
share.title: Share Matter code
share.link_hint: Only people with the full URL (including ?k=) can open the page. Not listed on the site.
share.link_copied: Secret link created and copied to clipboard.
share.link_created: Secret link created. Copy the URL from the dialog.
share.cloud_required: Configure Rematters Cloud and sync to enable sharing
